# iPumps — Grundfos pumbad Eestis
> Grundfos pumpade ametlik edasimüüja Eestis. 321 toodet laos — küte, jahutus, puurkaevud, drenaaž ja palju muud.

## Peamised lehed / Main pages

- [Avaleht / Home](https://pumbapood.ee/): Grundfos pumps and solutions, search, categories
- [Kõik tooted / All Products](https://pumbapood.ee/tooted): Complete product catalog with filters and search (321+ products)
- [Küttepumbad / Heating Pumps](https://pumbapood.ee/tooted/kute): Grundfos heating pumps for residential and commercial buildings
- [Jahutuspumbad / Cooling Pumps](https://pumbapood.ee/tooted/jahutus): Cooling pumps for climate systems
- [Sooja tarbevee pumbad / Hot Water Pumps](https://pumbapood.ee/tooted/sooja-tarbevee-tsirkulatsioonipump): Circulation pumps for boilers
- [Puurkaevu pumbad / Borewell Pumps](https://pumbapood.ee/tooted/puurkaevud): Deep well pumps up to 200m depth
- [Drenaaži pumbad / Drainage Pumps](https://pumbapood.ee/tooted/drenaaz): Drainage pumps for basements
- [Salvkaevu pumbad / Well Pumps](https://pumbapood.ee/tooted/salvkaevud): Surface water well pumps
- [Rõhutõste pumbad / Pressure Pumps](https://pumbapood.ee/tooted/rohutoste): Pressure boosters for water pressure
- [Reovee pumbad / Sewage Pumps](https://pumbapood.ee/tooted/reovesi): Sewage pumps for drainage systems
- [Kontakt / Contact](https://pumbapood.ee/leht/kontakt): Contact info and location

## Keeleversioonid / Language versions

- [Eesti (ET)](https://pumbapood.ee/) — Default
- [English (EN)](https://pumbapood.ee/en)
- [Русский (RU)](https://pumbapood.ee/ru)
- [Latviešu (LV)](https://pumbapood.ee/lv)
- [Lietuvių (LT)](https://pumbapood.ee/lt)
